sentences.translationEn: They decorated the room with colorful balloons.

sentences.translation: Donijeli su veliku tortu sa svijećom.
sentences.translationEn: They brought a big cake with a candle.

sentences.translation: Radosno su pjevali pjesmu za rođendan.
sentences.translationEn: They sang the birthday song joyfully.

sentences.translation: Poklonili su darove i Reem je zahvalila svima.
sentences.translationEn: They gave gifts and Reem thanked everyone.
